missions.name: Archive Reagent Retrieval
missions.description: Dean Porter needs sealed Earth archive reagents for the Institute's oldest cellular continuity trials.

missions.name: Cleanroom Parts Run
missions.description: Mars fabricators have sterile valve assemblies the Ceres Institute can still certify for century-scale biology work.

missions.name: Pressure Sample Case
missions.description: Porter wants Venus pressure-cured sample cases for a tissue vault that must survive ugly failure modes.
